ohmyclaude-lsp.description: Language server tools: goto-definition, find-references, symbols, diagnostics, rename. Requires language servers installed (typescript-language-server, pyright, gopls, rust-analyzer).

exa-search.description: Web search via Exa. Set EXA_API_KEY environment variable.

grep-app.description: Search public GitHub repositories via grep.app. No auth required.
